description: Issues or improvement priorities related to music/content availability, playlist, lyrics, shuffle, download, podcast, recommendations, and audio listening experience.
Issues or improvement priorities related to app performance, stability, loading, bugs, crashes, responsiveness, navigation, layout, and ease of use.
Issues or improvement priorities related to advertisement frequency, intrusiveness, interruption, and overall advertising experience.
Issues or improvement priorities related to premium subscription, pricing, payment, package value, and perceived affordability.
